title: [ImportVerilog] Support using string variables as arguments of $display

features.name: $display with string variable argument without format string
features.description: Code should include a $display system task call with a string type variable as argument when no format string literal is present

features.name: $display with indexed string array element argument
features.description: Code should include a $display call with an indexed element from a string unpacked array, where the array has more than one element

features.name: $display with mixed int and string arguments without format string
features.description: Code should include a $display system task with both integer and string type arguments without a format string literal
